scripts.dev: npm run build && node scripts/dev-server.mjs dist
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build.mjs
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node dist-test/zoneState.test.js && node api/teacher/_shared.test.mjs && node api/auth/student.test.mjs && node api/teacher/settings.test.mjs && node api/teacher/progress.test.mjs && node api/student-progress.test.mjs
